name: Hecarim

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Warpath
passive.description_source: Innate:  Hecarim gains  bonus attack damage equal to a portion of his  bonus movement speed.

effects.description: Innate: Hecarim gains bonus attack damage equal to 12% : 24% (based on level) of his bonus movement speed.

passive.description: Innate: Hecarim gains bonus attack damage equal to 12% : 24% (based on level) of his bonus movement speed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Warpath's bonus attack damage will adjust itself to any temporary movement speed buffs and debuffs Hecarim is affected by.

basic_ability_1.name: Rampage
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Hecarim cleaves his glaive to deal physical damage to nearby enemies.

effects.context_notes: Active: Hecarim cleaves his glaive around himself, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies, reduced to 60% against minions.
Active: Hecarim cleaves his glaive around himself, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies, reduced to 60% against minions.

effects.description: If this damages an enemy, Hecarim gains a stack of Rampage for 8 seconds, refreshing on subsequent damage and stacking up to 3 times. Each stack increases Rampage's damage by 3% (+ 3% per 100 bonus AD) and reduces its base cooldown by 0.75 seconds, up to a 9% (+ 9% per 100 bonus AD) damage increase and a 2.25-second reduction of the base cooldown at maximum stacks. Stacks expire one by one every 1 second when the duration ends.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Hecarim cleaves his glaive around himself, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies, reduced to 60% against minions.

basic_ability_2.name: Spirit of Dread
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Hecarim continually deals magic damage to nearby enemies for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Hecarim surrounds himself with the Spirit of Dread for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage every second to nearby enemies.
Active: Hecarim surrounds himself with the Spirit of Dread for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage every second to nearby enemies.
While active, Hecarim gains bonus armor and bonus magic resistance and is healed for 25% of the post-mitigation damage dealt to enemies within the area from all sources, halved to 12.
While active, Hecarim gains bonus armor and bonus magic resistance and is healed for 25% of the post-mitigation damage dealt to enemies within the area from all sources, halved to 12.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Hecarim surrounds himself with the Spirit of Dread for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage every second to nearby enemies.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The healing cap against minions accounts for every single one regardless of how many are present and/or affected by Spirit of Dread at the time of cast.

basic_ability_3.name: Devastating Charge
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Hecarim becomes  ghosted and builds up  bonus movement speed over a short time.

effects.description: Active: Hecarim becomes ghosted and gains 25% : 65% (based on time active) bonus total movement speed for 4 seconds.

effects.context_notes: During this time, Hecarim's next basic attack is replaced by a Devastating Charge, empowering it to gain 50 : 250 (based on distance traveled) bonus range and cause him to dash in the target's direction, revealing them for 1 second.

During this time, Hecarim's next basic attack is replaced by a Devastating Charge, empowering it to gain 50 : 250 (based on distance traveled) bonus range and cause him to dash in the target's direction, revealing them for 1 second.

effects.description: Devastating Charge can critically strike for (100% + 30%) AD bonus physical damage.
Devastating Charge resets Hecarim's basic attack timer. Hecarim can cast any of his abilities during the dash. Devastating Charge's duration is paused during Onslaught of Shadows.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Hecarim becomes ghosted and gains 25% : 65% (based on time active) bonus total movement speed for 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Hecarim can cast any of his abilities while dashing.
Manual review (2026-02-25): Devastating Charge is cast-primed with movement-speed buildup, then resolves combat payload on the first empowered-hit dash contact within the active window.

ultimate.name: Onslaught of Shadows
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Hecarim summons spectral riders and  charges in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies they pass through.

effects.context_notes: Active: Hecarim dashes with displacement immunity to the target location and summons 5 spectral riders in an arrow formation that charge alongside him in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies in their path and revealing them for 2.5 seconds.

effects.description: Upon arrival, he fears nearby enemies for 0.75 : 1.5 (based on distance traveled) seconds and slows them by 0% : 99% (based on distance from Hecarim).
The wave of spectral riders travels independently of Hecarim and will always charge at the same distance.

ultimate.description: Active: Hecarim dashes with displacement immunity to the target location and summons 5 spectral riders in an arrow formation that charge alongside him in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies in their path and revealing them for 2.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The spectral rider missiles originate at Hecarim's location, 145 units behind and 100 units to either side of him, and 290 units behind and 200 units to either side.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior re-verification for Devastating Charge movement-state buildup timing, empowered-hit dash-contact resolution, and attack-reset semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
